title: Senior Software Engineer - 99acres Asia Pacific Associates - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - 99acres Asia Pacific Associates - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the 99acres Asia Pacific Associates family as a Senior Software Engineer in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About 99acres Asia Pacific Associates:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres Asia Pacific Associates!
